ships.name: Prospector
ships.description: The Prospector is a small sized mining ship developed by Musashi Industrial and Starflight Concern. Designed as a single person operated vessel, it features a telescopic mining arm with interchangeable lasers, with 4 detachable collapsible ore storage containers and comfortable living quarters.[1] [2]

ships.name: Prowler
ships.description: The Prowler is an armored personnel carrier created by Esperia Incorporation. This vehicle represents a modern recreation of the Tevarin design that gained notoriety during the First and Second Tevarin Wars against the UPE. Esperia's astroengineers were granted unrestricted access to examine original models of the vehicle, which were recently uncovered in the Kabal system, facilitating a detailed reconstruction process. As a result, the Prowler embodies an ideal blend of two distinct cultures: the sophistication and efficiency of the Tevarin military apparatus merged with the dependability of modern human technology.[1][2][3]

ships.name: Prowler Utility
ships.description: The Prowler Utility is medium sized cargo variant of the Prowler series of spacecraft, developed by Esperia. Originally designed to support Tevarin military operations directly on the frontlines, it is outfitted with a tractor beam that facilitates the effective handling of cargo to its easily reachable hold. Furthermore, due to the ship's stealth capabilities, the Utility functions as an ideal transport for various discreet cargo operations.[1][2]

items.label: Geo wing vertical stabilizer extra right (rear)
Geo wing vertical stabilizer extra left (rear)

ships.name: Pulse
ships.description: The Pulse is a compact grav-cycle by Mirai. An open-canopy bike with a form-fitting silhouette and an intelligent integrated combat system, the Mirai Pulse is a fast, nimble vehicle for all planetary needs. The standard version showcases exceptional combat capabilities. Equipped with a Size 2 laser repeater mounted on the nose from the factory, engaging enemies directly has never been more thrilling. Performing jousting, hit-and-run, or bank-and-flank tactics is now more effortless than in the past.[1]

ships.name: Pulse LX
ships.description: The Pulse LX is a compact racing grav-cycle by Mirai. An open-canopy bike with a form-fitting silhouette and a focus on speed and maneuverability, the Mirai Pulse is a fast, nimble vehicle for all your racing needs. The operator's mastery over their Pulse is facilitated by the exceptional blend of rapid velocity and accurate handling. The LX model, featuring an extra maneuvering thruster, secures a strategic advantage on the racecourse, allowing it to outstrip, outmaneuver, and decisively conquer the competition.[1]

ships.name: RAFT
ships.description: The RAFT (Reinforced Advanced Freight Transport) is a medium cargo hauler developed by Argo Astronautics. This compact vehicle is designed to transport six standardized 32 SCU cargo containers, maximizing payload capacity and minimizing complications. Eliminate the hassle of hand-loading crates; the RAFT allows for efficient loading and unloading, preparing you for your next task. With reinforced shields, a robust weapons system, and a wide range of countermeasures, the RAFT ensures secure delivery of your cargo.[1][2][3]

items.label: Argo raft rr lg mainshaft mesh
Argo raft rl lg mainshaft mesh
Argo raft fr lg mainshaft mesh
Argo raft fl lg mainshaft mesh

ships.name: ROC
ships.description: The ROC (Remote Ore Collector) is a single-seat mining ground vehicle developed by Greycat Industrial. Emphasizing the fundamental aspects of land-based mining, Greycat has created the robust and practical ROC to support the miners who operate it. Featuring a precision gimbaled mining arm and all-terrain wheels, this independently operated vehicle exemplifies the significance of utilizing the appropriate equipment for the task at hand.[1][2]

ships.name: ROC-DS
ships.description: The ROC-DS (Remote Ore Collector Dual Seat) is a dual-seat mining vehicle produced by Greycat Industrial. Equipped with a more robust custom mining head, it is particularly suited for tasks that exceed initial expectations. The vehicle features a manually operated mining arm capable of accessing challenging deposits, thereby reducing operational difficulties. Additionally, it offers over four times the ore-storage capacity compared to the standard model, enhancing profitability.[1]

ships.name: Railen
ships.description: The Railen ( Xi'an: 9sanrai0len@font-face{font-family:"TemplateStyles-xiinthlea-Regular";src:local("xiinthlea"),local("xiinthlea Regular"),local("xiinthlea-Regular"),url("https://starcitizen.tools/resources/fonts/xiinthlea-Regular.woff2")format("woff2"),url("https://starcitizen.tools/resources/fonts/xiinthlea-Regular.woff")format("woff");font-weight:normal;font-style:normal}.mw-parser-output .lang-kyexiin{font-family:"TemplateStyles-xiinthlea-Regular";font-feature-settings:"liga"1,"calt"1,"dlig"1,"salt"1}(Sanrailen).mw-parser-output ruby{line-height:1.25}.mw-parser-output ruby>rt{font-size:0.65rem} (Proper); literally Ship that hauls peacefully; ).mw-parser-output .lang__label{font-size:0.875rem} is an upcoming multi-crew Xi'an cargo ship manufactured by Gatac Manufacture. Featuring grav-lev technology and tested design features, the Railen is promoted as a safe and reliable solution for commercial-grade medium cargo hauling.[1]

ships.name: Ranger CV
ships.description: The Ranger CV is a ground cargo variant of the Ranger series of vehicles developed by Tumbril Land Systems. Fitted with an additional fuel tank, a bespoke pannier, adaptive tread tires, and precision steering and braking that respond reactively, the CV is designed to conquer the untamed frontier, elevating adventure touring while also delivering the goods. [1][2]

ships.name: Ranger RC
ships.description: The Ranger RC is a ground racing variant of the Ranger series of vehicles developed by Tumbril Land Systems. Equipped with a streamlined frame, adaptive tread tires, and reactive response precision steering and braking, the Ranger RC allows you to embody the rebellious essence of the open road while remaining firmly rooted. Meticulously calibrated for optimal speed and responsiveness, the RC elevates performance, providing an intensely dynamic blend of speed and precision.[1][2]

ships.name: Ranger TR
ships.description: The Ranger TR is a ground combat variant of the Ranger series of vehicles developed by Tumbril Land Systems. Equipped with a robust frame, adaptive tread tires, and reactive response precision steering and braking, the Ranger TR allows you to embody the renegade essence of the open road while remaining firmly anchored. However, since adventures do not always unfold as anticipated, the TR is fitted with dual weapon mounts to ensure you are well-prepared.[1][2]

ships.name: Razor
ships.description: The Mirai Razor is a racer developed for the 2947 Murray Cup. It features an advanced composite spaceframe, cutting edge fuel collections systems, minimal cross-section, sleek aerodynamic lines, and proprietary Xi'an influenced thruster design that puts pure speed ahead of everything else.[1][2]

ships.name: Razor EX
ships.description: The Mirai Razor EX is the stealth variant of the Razor racer, outfitted with signature-reducing materials and stealth components. It was originally a specialty build for the UEE Advocacy for use in surveillance and extraction operations.[1]

ships.name: Razor LX
ships.description: The Razor LX represents a modified version of the Razor racer, produced by Mirai. This variant is characterized by an enhanced engine performance achieved through overclocking, which, while significantly increasing straight-line speed, results in diminished maneuverability and a reduction in armament capabilities.[1]

ships.name: Reclaimer
ships.description: The Reclaimer is an industrial heavy Salvage ship developed by Aegis Dynamics. It features a robust cargo bay, a long-range jump drive, and launch pods designed for unmanned drone, making it exceptionally suited for exploiting wrecks found in the depths of space. Additionally, the ship is equipped with tractor beams, floodlights, various scanning options, and docking ports, enhancing its functionality as a versatile and practical spacecraft.[1][2]

ships.name: Reclaimer Best In Show Edition
ships.description: The Reclaimer Best In Show Edition is a limited edition industrial salvage ship manufactured by Aegis Dynamics that was created especially for the 'Best In Show' event at the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo 2949 and has a unique white and purple livery. It is designed with a fortified cargo bay, an advanced long-range jump drive, and launch pods specifically for unmanned drones, making it exceptionally suited for exploring and salvaging deep space wrecks. Its array of features, including tractor beams, floodlights, various scanning options, and docking ports, enhances the functionality of this versatile and practical spacecraft.[1]

ships.name: Redeemer
ships.description: The Redeemer is a gunship developed by Aegis Dynamics. It has been designed as a powerful combat gunship, featuring advanced engineering that enhances its operational capabilities in warfare. It is outfitted with durable turrets that provide significant firepower, allowing for effective targeting and engagement of enemy forces. Additionally, the gunship carries a missile payload, which further amplifies its offensive capabilities. This combination the ship to participate effectively in various combat scenarios, ensuring it can confront and neutralize threats on the battlefield with efficiency and precision.[1]

ships.name: Reliant Kore
ships.description: The Reliant Kore is a light transport variant of the Reliant series developed by Musashi Industrial and Starflight Concern. Incorporating sophisticated designs from the Xi’An, Kore boasts wide, streamlined wings, omni-directional thrusters, and a fully articulated two-seat cockpit that accommodates both horizontal and vertical flight modes. This design not only enhances its functionality but also provides a greater carrying capacity compared to many vessels in its category, making the ship an ideal option for short-range transport.[1][2][3]

ships.name: Reliant Mako
ships.description: The MISC Reliant Mako is a news van variant of the Reliant series. It combines the flexibility of the Reliant frame with a state-of-the-art image enhancement suite and turret-mounted optics.[1] The need for the reporting variant was identified after a review of Spectrum broadcasts that featured low-quality video of combat incidents, as well as an increase of such incidents themselves.[2]

ships.name: Reliant Sen
ships.description: The MISC Reliant Sen is a versatile single-ship explorer and science platform, intended to be outfitted with long range capabilities and an advanced sensor suite. It is intended to function both alone, or as part of the fleet of a MISC Endeavor. Despite the intent of the ship's design, the current in-game fuel tanks and sensor array are both typical for ships of the Sen's size class.[1]

ships.name: Reliant Tana
ships.description: The MISC Reliant Tana is a versatile fighter. Easy to maintain with a rugged construction, the Reliant Tana makes for an ideal choice for frontier and outpost defense thanks to its custom high-yield power plant, stronger shields and additional weapon mounts.[1]

ships.name: Retaliator
ships.description: The Retaliator is a large modular gunship developed by Aegis Dynamics. It is designed with modular capabilities that allow for customization tailored to either combat or utility purposes. For centuries, this vessel has been employed by the UEE Military as a long-range bomber. It plays a crucial role in the UEE's power projection strategy, with Retaliator squadrons having distinguished themselves in engagements against outlaws, the Vanduul, and in various other theaters of operation.[1][2]

ships.name: SRV
ships.description: The SRV (Standard Recovery Vehicle) is a 'tugboat' spacecraft developed by Argo Astronautics. It is designed to manage a wide range of tasks, from basic freight and cargo towing to challenging search-and-rescue missions. Its custom tractor system features a unique combination of plates and arms, enabling easy solo operation as well as coordinated team towing for larger assignments. Additionally, the safety of your crew and passengers is prioritized, as robust shields and heavy-duty armor protect the cockpit and essential components during critical situations.[1][2]

ships.name: STV
ships.description: The STV (Sport Terrain Vehicle) is a personal transport ground vehicle developed by Greycat Industrial. This open-top off-road vehicle has been engineered by experts to fulfill the needs of professionals. It seamlessly combines speed with practical integrated storage solutions, ensuring that users can efficiently manage their tools and equipment. Furthermore, the design prioritizes user comfort, creating an enjoyable experience even during demanding work tasks.[1][2]

ships.name: Sabre
ships.description: The Sabre is a fighter and the original variant of the Sabre series developed by Aegis Dynamics. This aircraft is designed to function as a space superiority fighter, especially in situations that necessitate a minimized operational presence. As a highly efficient rapid response unit, the Sabre is adept at establishing battlefield dominance in diverse combat scenarios.[1][2]

ships.name: Sabre Comet
ships.description: The Sabre Comet is a special edition variant of the Sabre manufactured by Aegis Dynamics. Developed as part of the Masters of Flight series in, collaboration with the flight simulation Arena Commander, the Comet serves as a homage to the renowned pilot Captain Kamur Dalion, recognizing his contributions to Aegis in pioneering a new age of combat ship design. This variant of the Sabre is outfitted with a tailored loadout specifically designed for dogfighting, along with a unique special edition livery that pays tribute to this legendary vessel.[1]

ships.name: Sabre Firebird
ships.description: The Sabre Firebird is a medium fighter belonging to the Sabre series, developed by Aegis Dynamics. Designed for swift and relentless assaults using its customized missile system, this high-velocity combat aircraft excels in launching rapid barrages. Its primary objective is to neutralize potential dangers swiftly, leaving adversaries with minimal time to respond. This versatile fighter is equally proficient in embarking on extended-range missions or swiftly mobilizing to safeguard your operational headquarters.[1][2]

ships.name: Sabre Peregrine
ships.description: The Sabre Peregrine is a medium racing ship manufactured by Aegis Dynamics. The Peregrine represents the pinnacle of speed among Sabre models, utilizing the renowned military-derived Sabre chassis and refining it for unparalleled velocity. This already aerodynamic structure is enhanced by custom thrusters and meticulously optimized engines, propelling the Peregrine's straight-line speed into an entirely new category.[1]

ships.name: Salvation
ships.description: The Salvation is a small salvaging ship developed by Roberts Space Industries. Intended to serve as an introductory vehicle for aspiring salvagers, the vehicle is designed where every component, from the salvaging arm and the onboard processing facility to the convenient external storage, has been carefully honed and optimized, allowing even a beginner to handle it with the confidence of a seasoned professional.[1][2][3]

ships.name: San'tok.yāi
ships.description: The San'tok.yāi ( Xi'an: San2to0kyaai1@font-face{font-family:"TemplateStyles-xiinthlea-Regular";src:local("xiinthlea"),local("xiinthlea Regular"),local("xiinthlea-Regular"),url("https://starcitizen.tools/resources/fonts/xiinthlea-Regular.woff2")format("woff2"),url("https://starcitizen.tools/resources/fonts/xiinthlea-Regular.woff")format("woff");font-weight:normal;font-style:normal}.mw-parser-output .lang-kyexiin{font-family:"TemplateStyles-xiinthlea-Regular";font-feature-settings:"liga"1,"calt"1,"dlig"1,"salt"1}(San'tok.yāi).mw-parser-output ruby{line-height:1.25}.mw-parser-output ruby>rt{font-size:0.65rem} (Proper); literally ship that creates genuine fear; ).mw-parser-output .lang__label{font-size:0.875rem} is an export model of the Xi'an military medium fighter of the same name, developed by the Aopoa Corporation. This ship is specifically designed for the human civilian market and incorporates advanced Xi'an flight systems, enhanced dual-vector thrusters, and improved armament.[1][2][3]

ships.name: Scorpius
ships.description: The Scorpius is a two-seat heavy fighter developed by Roberts Space Industries Applied Innovations division. It is designed as the latest advancement in heavy combat, interception, and dogfighting capabilities. Featuring a versatile bi-wing design and an innovative rail-mounted remote turret, the Scorpius provides exceptional fire coverage for both defensive and offensive operations. It stands as the quintessential enforcer, serving as an ideal addition to any combat-ready fleet aiming to instill fear in its adversaries through the delivery of justice.[1][2]

ships.name: Scorpius Antares
ships.description: The Scorpius Antares is a interdiction variant of the Scorpius heavy fighter, equipped with a co-pilot operated EMP device and quantum jammer in place of its turret. Specializing in short-range takedowns and squad-focused attacks, the Antares is a powerful utility fighter that can disable and trap enemy vessels while continuing to output significant firepower.[1]

ships.name: Scythe (replica)
ships.description: The Esperia Scythe is a replica of the Vanduul Scythe medium fighter manufactured for Human usage. It is used as an aggressor in United Empire of Earth Navy (UEEN) training units such as the 323rd Aggressor Squadron. An extremely limited number of the ship is available to civilian hobbyists.[1]

ships.name: Shiv
ships.description: The Shiv is a heavy fighter sold by Grey's Market. Crudely assembled from a diverse collection of different spacecraft from manufacturers including Anvil, Drake, and MISC, this formidable fighter is designed to endure the severe conditions of uncharted space, demonstrating that the reputation of your vessel is secondary to how you utilize it.[1][2]

ships.name: Spartan
ships.description: The Spartan is an armored personnel carrier manufactured by Anvil Aerospace, boasting a turret and an impressive armored hull to transport up to eight troops and equipment to hardened compounds. Built off the same Atlas chassis as the Ballista,[1] the Spartan is the most effective option for transporting troops to the front line.[2]

ships.name: Starfarer
ships.description: The Starfarer is a large Refueling vessel developed by Musashi Industrial and Starflight Concern. It distinguishes itself from conventional bulk freighters primarily by serving as a specialized fuel platform. It is engineered not only to load, store, and safeguard fuel stasis units but also to extract and refine space-borne gases for utilization without the need to land. In addition to its proficiency in fuel management, the Starfarer is capable of transporting standard bulk cargo pods.[1][2]

ships.name: Starfarer Gemini
ships.description: The Starfarer Gemini is the military version of the large refueling vessel known as the Starfarer, a collaborative development between Musashi Industrial and Starflight Concern and Aegis Dynamics. The vessel, also referred to as the G2M Gemini or 'Star G', is primarily designed to facilitate supply chains in the UEE frontline operations. Additionally, it possesses the capability to assist squadrons of fighter aircraft during multi-system combat missions. The Gemini features enhanced armor, improved shielding, more robust engines, and larger artillery and missiles, albeit at the cost of cargo capacity and maneuverability.[1][2][3][4]

ships.name: Starlancer MAX
ships.description: The Starlancer MAX is a medium freighter developed by Musashi Industrial and Starflight Concern. It is designed specifically for deep space operations and features two cargo holds. This vessel enables freelance operators and commercial enterprises to explore further into the 'verse, pushing beyond established boundaries to support the expansion of Humanity's frontiers.[1][2]

ships.name: Starlancer TAC
ships.description: The Starlancer TAC is a variant of the Starlancer series of large-sized ships developed by Musashi Industrial and Starflight Concern. This vessel has been designed as a patrol vessel and is capable of functioning in deep space. It features significant weaponry, eight jump seats, medical facilities, and a specialized hangar for the Mirai Fury. Overall, the Starlancer TAC integrates offensive strength, crew comfort, and operational flexibility.[1][2][3]

ships.name: Stinger (replica)
ships.description: The Esperia Stinger is a human-made replica of the Vanduul Stinger. The original Vanduul heavy fighter - designated as 'Stinger' by the United Empire of Earth Navy - has established a notorious reputation for causing significant disruption along the borders of Humanity and as a formidable danger to both pilots and capital ships. Initially re-created for the purpose of training elite UEEN pilots, Esperia is now offering their meticulously crafted replica to the wider civilian market.[1][2]

ships.name: Storm
ships.description: The Storm is a light tank variant, within the Storm series of ground vehicles, which has been developed by Tumbril Land Systems. Initially conceived as a single-seat blitz tank for the Second Tevarin War, Tumbril has enhanced the original design, resulting in a vehicle that is faster, more robust, and more effective than its predecessors. Currently, the Storm serves as a light/scout tank, offering reconnaissance capabilities with light firepower while also supporting other vehicles, like its larger counterpart the Nova, on the battlefield.[1][2][3]

ships.name: Storm AA
ships.description: The Storm AA is a light anti-air variant, within the Storm series of ground vehicles, which has been developed by Tumbril Land Systems. This vehicle is engineered to be a powerful asset, equipped with numerous ground-to-air missiles, and is focused on ensuring air superiority by neutralizing aerial threats as well as ground-based dangers. Additionally, it functions as a reconnaissance unit and provides support to other vehicles such as the Storm and the Nova.[1][2]

ships.name: Syulen
ships.description: The Syulen, ( Xi'an; Xi'an: Syu0len@font-face{font-family:"TemplateStyles-xiinthlea-Regular";src:local("xiinthlea"),local("xiinthlea Regular"),local("xiinthlea-Regular"),url("https://starcitizen.tools/resources/fonts/xiinthlea-Regular.woff2")format("woff2"),url("https://starcitizen.tools/resources/fonts/xiinthlea-Regular.woff")format("woff");font-weight:normal;font-style:normal}.mw-parser-output .lang-kyexiin{font-family:"TemplateStyles-xiinthlea-Regular";font-feature-settings:"liga"1,"calt"1,"dlig"1,"salt"1}(Syulen).mw-parser-output ruby{line-height:1.25}.mw-parser-output ruby>rt{font-size:0.65rem} /sju˧lɛn˧/ ( listen) (Proper); literally Fly Peacefully; ).mw-parser-output .lang__label{font-size:0.875rem} is a light cargo ship produced by Gatac Manufacture. It has been designed by the esteemed House Ng.at'ak to cater to the needs of both Human and Xi'an pilots. Boasting a sleek and nimble structure, the Syulen is perfectly suited for transporting crucial shipments throughout the vast expanse of the 'Verse. Additionally, it serves as an excellent choice for aspiring transport professionals embarking on their career journey.[1][2]

ships.name: Talon
ships.description: The Esperia Talon is a small and light single-seat fighter designed for escort services and targeted strikes. Built in the Tevarin style, the Talon has powerful, directional "Phalanx" shields for maximum maneuverability, but weak physical armor once the shields are dropped. A pair of Size 4 weapons and a size 3 missile rack complement the Talon's "strike first and strike hard" combat style.[1][2][3]

ships.name: Talon Shrike
ships.description: The Esperia Talon Shrike is a variant of the basic Talon strike craft with smaller weapons and more missiles. The Talon Shrike trades in its Size 3 weapons for Size 1 guns, but has been modified with an internal missile bay carrying 24x Size 3 missiles. Using its maneuverability and directional Phalanx shields, the Talon Shrike delivers its missile payload quickly on-target before evading pursuit.[1][2][3]

ships.name: Terrapin
ships.description: The Anvil U4A-3 Terrapin is a deep-space armored scout ship utilized by the United Empire of Earth Navy (UEEN). Outfitted with sensitive long-range scanners, it is used for long duration reconnaissance and leg patrol missions where crewmembers might need to be separated from support facilities for weeks at a time. The spacecraft is encased with heavy armor and an oversized shield generator that allows it to survive skirmishes with lighter raiding craft and extreme environment.[1][2]

ships.name: Terrapin Medic
ships.description: The Terrapin Medic is a medical support vessel designed by Anvil Aerospace. Featuring a tier 2 medical bed, this ship is adept at securely extracting injured persons from hazardous situations, thanks to its durable armor and shielding systems. Functioning as both a compact frontline trauma center and a resilient search and rescue craft, the Terrapin Medic and its crew are dedicated to preserving lives and ensuring operational continuity in the most challenging environments and circumstances.[1]

ships.name: UTV
ships.description: The UTV (Utility Terrain Vehicle) is an ground utility vehicle manufactured by Greycat Industrial. Emphasizing simplicity, dependability, and functionality, this compact two-seater provides the necessary features, allowing you to maximize your time on the planet's surface. Prepared to confront the most challenging terrains as soon as you land, accelerate the UTV to explore ahead, transport cargo, or leisurely enjoy the extended route.[1] [2]

ships.name: Ursa
ships.description: The RSI Ursa is a civilian all-terrain rover that comes stock with the Constellation Aquila and Carrack, though it is a popular companion to other ships as well. The Ursa is primarily used to support ground-based exploration, particularly in circumstances where the use of its mothership is either impractical or impossible.

ships.name: Ursa Fortuna
ships.description: The Ursa Fortuna is a special edition of the Ursa all-terrain rover, which has been developed by Robert Space Industries. This variant was specifically designed to commemorate the widely celebrated Stella Fortuna holiday and features a unique dark green color scheme. The Ursa, originating from a military vehicle design, demonstrates significant survivability and firepower suitable for low-intensity combat scenarios. Complementing its protective shield, the vehicle is equipped with a compact remote turret that, when deployed, provides an extensive range of fire. The internal cargo compartment is designed to transport a useful quantity of equipment and/or cargo. Alternatively, this space can be configured to seat up to four passengers, utilizing foldable seating arrangements.[1][2]

ships.name: Ursa Medivac
ships.description: The RSI Ursa Medivac (also known as Nursa) is a all-terrain medical ground vehicle. It plays a crucial role in delivering vital medical assistance to the forefront of any land-based mission. By incorporating a tier 3 med-bed into the already esteemed attributes of RSI's Ursa, such as its exceptional speed, maneuverability, and resilience, the notion of failure is no longer intertwined with death and dismemberment. The Ursa Medivac ensures that your severely injured infantry does not have to endure a prolonged wait before rejoining the battle. Swiftly mend their wounds and swiftly return them to the forefront of action with the Ursa Medivac.

ships.name: Valkyrie
ships.description: The Valkyrie heavy dropship is a troop transport developed by Anvil Aerospace. It is designed to safely deploy up to twenty armed troops along with vehicles into combat zones. Armed with multiple turrets and side guns, it can provide heavy overwatch to deployed troops, clearing a safe landing zone.[1]

ships.name: Valkyrie Liberator
ships.description: The Valkyrie Liberator is a distinctive variant of the Valkyrie troop transporter, manufactured by Anvil Aerospace. This special edition was specifically developed to commemorate the introduction of the Valkyrie and features a distinctive copper-colored exterior. The Valkyrie is engineered to securely transport up to twenty armed personnel alongside a single vehicle into combat environments. Equipped with several turrets and side-mounted weapons, it is capable of delivering substantial fire support to the deployed troops, ensuring the establishment of a secure landing area.[1]

ships.name: Vanguard Harbinger
ships.description: The Aegis A3G Vanguard Harbinger is UEE's standard fighter-bomber, converting the standard Warden model's escape pod into a potent bomb bay. The extended range of the Vanguard and the relatively small profile mean that it can go where carrier-based planes or larger strategic bombers don't... and then strike hard and make it back to frontier bases. The Vanguard Harbinger is a powerful bomber that can operate out of the roughest forward operating bases.[1]

ships.name: Vanguard Hoplite
ships.description: The Aegis Vanguard Hoplite is a cross between the Vanguard deep space fighter and a dedicated boarding ship. Adapting the reliable base design for combined operations, the Hoplite is designed to insert an armored strike team in its target location and provide it with fire support until extraction.[1]

ships.name: Vanguard Sentinel
ships.description: The Aegis A3G Vanguard Sentinel is an electronic warfare ship that's designed to fight smart instead of taking enemies head on. The conversion features an AR cockpit, an external e-War pod, decoy missiles and a set of EMP charges. Vanguard Sentinels often provide necessary combat support for combined operations. A lone Sentinel assigned wild weasel tasks is frequently paired with Harbinger bombers and Warden escorts for large attack missions.[1]

ships.name: Vanguard Warden
ships.description: The Aegis A3G Vanguard Warden is a long-range military fighter which features extensive forward-mounted weaponry designed to tear through the shields and armor of other spacecraft. So-named because their multiple-jump range allows them to form the vanguard of any military expedition, Vanguards have seen extensive service against the Vanduul.[1][2]

ships.name: Vulcan
ships.description: The Aegis Vulcan is a versatile support ship capable of refueling, repairing, and rearming other vessels. It is designed to provide support in scenarios including assisting friendly pilots pinned down by heavy fire and in need of ammunition, those low on quantum fuel after an ill-planned jump, or stranded in unknown space with a busted thruster.[1]

ships.name: Vulture
ships.description: The Vulture is a small salvage ship manufactured by Drake Interplanetary. Focusing on long range and self-reliance, the Vulture allows single-operators to engage salvage with Drake's signature emphasis on practicality.[1][2]

ships.name: X1
ships.description: The Origin X1 an open-canopy racer designed by Origin in collaboration with Alberto Vara and his company Infinity Customs. It is an exquisite masterpiece, showcasing its elegance and agility. This open-canopy vehicle effortlessly combines beauty and functionality, making it a true work of art. Its sleek hull seamlessly incorporates thrusters, enhancing its maneuverability and performance. The X1 proudly upholds Origin's tradition of luxury perfection, embodying the perfect fusion of form and function.[1]

ships.name: X1 Force
ships.description: The X1 Force which is produced by Origin Jumpworks, ensures a secure and worry-free travel experience. With its enhanced defensive features, which includes shields, this innovative open-canopy vehicle is perfectly designed for various purposes such as ground-based exploration, reconnaissance expeditions, and security operations.[1]

ships.name: X1 Velocity
ships.description: The Origin Jumpworks X1 Velocity, with its lightweight framework, boosts speed and performance. Its advanced materials and engineering techniques reduce weight without compromising strength. The streamlined design improves aerodynamics for unparalleled efficiency. Its precise handling and maneuverability make every turn thrilling. The X1 Velocity's sleek design and exceptional performance make it a standout in the open-canopy racer collection. Overall, its lighter framework enhances performance and elevates the racing experience.[1]

ships.name: Zeus Mk II CL
ships.description: The Zeus Mk II CL, manufactured by Roberts Space Industries, is a multi-crew medium cargo hauler. The Zeus features respectable firepower, comprehensive crew amenities, and a generous cargo capacity. The onboard tractor beam also greatly expedites freight handling.

ships.name: Zeus Mk II ES
ships.description: Roberts Space Industries has developed the Zeus Mk II ES, a multi-crew exploratory spacecraft specifically engineered for the purpose of exploration. This vessel features a cutting-edge radar system that facilitates the efficient identification of new discoveries. Furthermore, the ES is enhanced with sophisticated weaponry and protective shielding, ensuring the secure return of both the crew and the discoveries acquired throughout the mission.[1]
